titleStmt.title: SII 31.156: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 156. (A.R. No. B 226 of 1936.) MATUKUMALLI, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up behind the image of Āñjanēya, situated in the back-side of the village Karaṇam's house.
This is dated Śaka 1406, Krōdhi, Kārttīka, śu. 15, Friday lunar eclipse, corresponding to Wednesday, November 3, 1484 A.D. (not Friday).

Damaged. It registers, the gift of the village Maṟakaṁballi (Read: Mutukumpali in A.R.Ep. 1935-36, p31), in Vinikonda-sīma, by mahāpātra Ajamakhāna sāmantamahāpātra on the occasion of the lunar eclipse. The eclipse actually occurred in the previous month i.e. Āśvajuya (1484 A.D., October 4, Monday), Ajamakhān was holding the posts like Purāparīksha (officer in charge of town) and Deobhāṇḍāru parīksha (officer incharge of temples), during the period of Purushottama Gajapati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakava jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1406
Agunēṭi krōdhi saṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu 15
śu . śrījaganādhavaraprasāda śrīpuruṣōttamagaja
pati mahārājāṁka śrīpadmavāḍa cara
khātaṁḍu purāparīkṣa dōUbhaṁḍāruparīkṣa
mahāpātra śrīAjamakhāna sāmaṁta
mahāpātraniṁgāru maṟakaṁballiṁyā
caṁdrā¨rkadha¨rmmaśāsanapatraḥ . vinikoṁḍaśimalōni
maṟakaṁbaṁlli catuśīmāyaktaṁgānu . nithini
kṣēpajala dā(pā)ṣāṇa kūpa phalavrikṣālu sahitaṁgānu
tējasvāmyaṁgānu sa¨rva mānyaṁgānu
nāṁḍu sōmagrahaṇa
puṇyakālamaṁdu thāravōśi yistimi .
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkaṁgānu
ccibratikēdi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
ti vasuṁtharā . ṣaṣṭhivva¨rṣa sahasrā
jāyatēkrimiḥ . yi(yī)dānadhamma
rivāraṁ vārugāna
braṁhmatyalu cēśina pāpānaṁ bō
vu vāru . turukarājulu da
ppirā musābukuḍu paṁ
diṁ diṁna pāpāna bōvuvrā
ru . muḍupāru tina pāpāna
pōvāru
Digital edition of SII 31.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
